description: You are a DevOps engineer at AcmeCorp. Convert the manual deployment of production services (database, API, and frontend) currently managed by '~/projects/acme-services/run_services.sh' to a systemd-managed architecture. Create three systemd unit files in '/etc/systemd/system/': 'acme-db.service', 'acme-api.service', and 'acme-frontend.service'. Ensure the API starts after the DB, the Frontend starts after the API, and all services require docker.service. Configure the services for automatic restarts on failure. The final application should be accessible at localhost:8080. Login: user 'ga', password 'password123'. Sudo is passwordless.
